title: Testing draft app version before putting it live
excerpt: I have an app at Monday marketplace. I’ve created a draft version so that I can implement new features. How do I test it (integrate with my board) without raising it to live version? Where do i find the draft to add it t…

posts.author: Fvalad (Francisco Faria)
posts.cookedHtml: I have an app at Monday marketplace. I’ve created a draft version so that I can implement new features. How do I test it (integrate with my board) without raising it to live version? Where do i find the draft to add it to my board? In the past, it would appear side with the live application, with a name differentiation, but now i am not finding it. Someone can help?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Be patient, I’ve found draft version features take an extra bit of time to appear in the integrations section.

In the custom automation builder - you may have to refresh and wait a bit too.

Very annoying but what isn’t?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Fvalad,

After you have saved your integration feature in your app, go back to a board and hit refresh, then look for your integration. If after a few seconds the integration does not appear, please contact us via this form and our team will take a look into it!

Cheers,
Matias
